design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. An editorial experience that relies on 'out-sized typography', 'floating minimalism', and 'calm design' principles. We prioritize reading clarity, tension through asymmetry, and a high-end magazine feel without the clutter. No generic rounded SaaS cards—everything is sharp, intentional, and grid-based.

rules.headings: Use extreme weight contrast (Black vs Light). Never use 'Inter' for headings. Never center headings unless inside a specific asymmetrical bento block.
rules.body: Optimize for long-form reading. Max width for article bodies should be 'max-w-prose' (approx 65ch) to maintain readability.
rules.hierarchy_gap: Ensure the jump between heading and subheading does not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.

rules.tinted_grey: All greys are slightly tinted (zinc/slate scale in Tailwind) to avoid dead colors.
rules.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio for body text, 3:1 for large text and interactive elements. Always set explicit hover colors.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical templates. Sections should have 'py-24' or 'py-32'.

grids.homepage: Bento 'Tetris' Grid Mode A. Asymmetrical layout. Base grid 'grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8'. Ensure empty negative space blocks to let content breathe.
grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid Mode B. Dense, data-heavy, strict hierarchy. 'grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6'.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align by default for reading flows. Center only for explicit hero statements or balanced artistic blocks.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Containers with borders must use 'p-8' or 'p-12' internally.

components_strategy.buttons: Sharp edges ('rounded-none' or max 'rounded-sm'). Solid high-contrast backgrounds. Hover state must lift ('-translate-y-0.5') and change background hue.
components_strategy.cards_and_articles: Grid Borders style. Flat solid background, 1px subtle border ('border-border'), NO soft shadows by default. Use 'hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)]' for interactive lifts.
components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Minimalist 'calm design'. Inputs should have sharp borders, generous padding ('p-4'). Focus rings must be high-contrast ('focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:border-transparent').
components_strategy.editor: Multimodal 'Calm' Editor. Hide complexity by default. Generous whitespace, clean typography, floating command palette (Cmd+K) pattern for AI tools.
components_strategy.navigation: Crystal Glass style if sticky ('bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5'). Solid background if not sticky. Never transparent over images.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Sharp, intentional, and utilitarian. No bouncy or playful animations.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images inside article cards should slightly zoom ('scale-105') while container stays fixed ('overflow-hidden').
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use skeletal loaders with sharp edges, not spinners, for article lists.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="login-submit-button"', 'data-testid="article-card-{id}"').
accessibility_and_testing.focus: Visible focus states are mandatory for keyboard navigation.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has a gradient overlay ('bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent') to guarantee readability.
accessibility_and_testing.reduced_motion: Wrap complex animations in '(prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)' checks.

hero_and_landing.description: A clean and organized home office setup. Use for hero section background or main platform showcase.
Minimalist desk detail (pinecone/tea). Great for 'About' or 'Writing Environment' sections.

author_avatars.description: Grayscale portrait of woman. Use for default admin or top author profile.
Elegant black and white portrait of a woman writing. Perfect for 'Featured Creator' section.
Stylish black and white portrait of a man. Use for comment section examples or guest authors.

post_covers_abstract.description: White and black abstract painting. Use as default blog cover for technology/AI topics.
Abstract steel structure. Perfect cover for structural/business articles.
Curved building with sky. Excellent for lifestyle or creative process articles.

instructions_to_main_agent: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif fonts for headings. Stick to 'Outfit' for titles and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text.
Implement a strict 'calm design' for the AI text editor: hide complex tools, rely on progressive disclosure, and ensure the canvas has generous whitespace.
When building grids, DO NOT use perfect symmetry everywhere. Create tension by making one block span 2 columns while others span 1.

Use Shadcn UI for the dashboard, forms, and functional modals, but strip away the default Vercel-look. Remove border-radius ('rounded-none') and heavy box-shadows to fit the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.
Ensure 'data-testid' is attached to every single button, link, and form input.

When displaying AI generated summaries, house them in a distinctly styled block (e.g., solid #002FA7 background with white text, or a sharp 1px border block with a 'monospaced' label) to visually separate AI content from human content.
Use the exact image URLs provided in the media section. NO placeholders (like via.placeholder.com).
